introSection: Zoom Coaster is a sit-down kiddie roller coaster at Oaks Amusement Park in Portland, Oregon, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride opened in 1999 and was formerly called Zoooooom.

The ride received a new train in 2025.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Purple track and grey supports. The ride previously had blue track.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The ride received a new train in 2025.

fullText:
Zoom Coaster is a sit-down kiddie roller coaster at Oaks Amusement Park in Portland, Oregon, USA.

The ride opened in 1999 and was formerly called Zoooooom.

The ride received a new train in 2025.



Purple track and grey supports. The ride previously had blue track.

The ride received a new train in 2025.
